name: Coconut Snowballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Line 12 medium muffin cups (2 1/2 x 1 1/4 inches) with paper or foil baking cups.
2. Spread coconut in a shallow pan or on a plate.
3. Scoop ice cream into 12 balls and place them on the prepared baking cups.
4. Roll each ice cream ball in coconut, using two forks to coat evenly.
5. Place the rolled balls back into the muffin cups.
6. Freeze uncovered for at least 3 hours until firm.
7. Wrap and label the snowballs, then return them to the freezer.
8. Store up to 2 weeks. Serve frozen in paper baking cups.
Tinted Coconut Snowballs: Shake coconut and 4 drops of red or green food color in a tightly covered container until the coconut is evenly tinted.
